## Purpose

Describe the corpus, text-method, or evidence problem this change addresses.

## Boundaries checked

- [ ] Automated topics are not presented as human meaning or ground truth.
- [ ] Sentiment remains a labeled lexical signal with local human validation where available.
- [ ] Time, source, platform, and brand comparisons remain descriptive.
- [ ] Duplication, selection, privacy, and stability warnings remain visible.
- [ ] No proprietary course or private third-party material was copied.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Ruff passes.
- [ ] Documentation and fictional examples are updated.
